self_vs_party.name: Self vs Other Party
self_vs_party.pattern: 世=self, 應=other party; 用神=person-type 六親
self_vs_party.key_axis: 世應 relationship (生克) determines power balance

self_vs_asset.name: Self vs Asset
self_vs_asset.pattern: 世=self, 用神=material 六親 (妻財 or 子孫)
self_vs_asset.key_axis: 財 strength + 子孫 support; 兄弟 = spoiler

self_vs_endeavor.name: Self vs Endeavor
self_vs_endeavor.pattern: 世=self, 用神=goal-type 六親 (官 or 子)
self_vs_endeavor.key_axis: 用神 旺相 + 持世 = success; 忌神 動 = failure

body_vs_condition.name: Body vs Condition
body_vs_condition.key_axis: Physical state indicators; trigram imagery for body parts

self_vs_dwelling.name: Self vs Dwelling
self_vs_dwelling.pattern: 世=self/wind-water, 用神=財+子; 六爻=spatial mapping
self_vs_dwelling.key_axis: Line positions map to physical spaces; 旺相=new, 休囚=old

self_vs_journey.name: Self vs Journey
self_vs_journey.key_axis: Motion patterns: 初=足, 二=身, 動=coming; 遊魂/八純 contraindicated

self_fate.name: Self-Fate
self_fate.pattern: 世 IS the 用神; no external focus
self_fate.key_axis: 世 line's own strength, position, and interactions

adversary.name: Adversary / Spirit
adversary.pattern: 用神 = 官鬼 (the threat/spirit); valence contextual
adversary.key_axis: 官鬼 as target to identify, capture, or pacify; 子孫 = remedy

special_protocols.unique_mechanism: 用神 IS the illness (官鬼). Standard: strong 用神 = good. Here: WEAK 官鬼 = good (illness is weak). The 生克 network inverts: 子孫 (normally neutral) becomes the hero (克鬼 = cure). Three-墓 system: 宮墓 (palace graveyard at 世 = self合災), 鬼墓 (illness graveyard at 世 = trapped in illness), 財墓 (wealth graveyard = 吉兆, unless querent is female). 鬼's element → disease type (金=lung, 木=liver, 水=kidney, 火=heart, 土=spleen). 鬼's position (inner/outer trigram) → body location.
key_formulas: 鬼伏世下 = illness follows the body
大忌申酉持世, 木爻獨發 (申=喪車, 酉=喪服, 木=棺槨)

special_protocols.layer_shift: 天干 becomes primary (normally 地支 dominates)
special_protocols.unique_mechanism: Dual-layer system. Layer 1: 天干合化 — day stem combines with hexagram stems via five transformations: 甲己化土=overcast, 丁壬化木=wind, 乙庚化金=rain, 丙辛化水=rain, 戊癸化火=clear. Layer 2: 六親 overlay — 父母=rain, 妻財=clear, 兄弟=wind, 子孫=cloud/fog, 官鬼=thunder. Inner 動=daytime event, outer 動=nighttime event. Branch specifics: 辰丑動=rain, 未戌動=clear. Timing uses 日辰 克日定時 for exact hour prediction.
key_formulas: 父母長生日 or 帝旺日 = rain
壬癸動 = rain; 丙丁 = clear; 庚辛 = rain then clear

special_protocols.unique_mechanism: Object identification protocol. 財=surface/material (表), 鬼=interior/type (里). Both visible = complete object with surface and substance. Have 表 no 里 = externally real, internally empty. Have 里 no 表 = hidden substance. Both hidden = light/empty object. Trigrams → material class: 乾兌=metal/jade, 震巽=wood/bamboo, 坎=fish/water, 離=silk/thread, 坤艮=earth/stone. Shape from 世應 interaction: 合=round, 扶=long, 生=square, 克=damaged, 刑=pointed, 沖=broken. 陽卦=round, 陰卦=square. 應旺=new, 衰=old. Six spirits = directional position.
key_formulas: 世應合=圓, 相生=方, 相克=損

special_protocols.mode_shift: meta — direction reverses (hexagram → question, not question → reading)
special_protocols.unique_mechanism: Reverse protocol. Instead of domain determining 用神, the hexagram's 六親 composition reveals the domain. Count 六親 frequencies: the dominant type indicates what the person came to ask about (卦中多者取來情). 18 pattern rules in 達人事 match structural features to question types: e.g., 真喜合宅母 → pregnancy; 玄武臨門勾陳動 → theft; 祿馬合月鬼動 → career ambition; 文書乘朱動五爻 → lawsuit filing. This is the system's self-referential layer — the divination reads itself.
key_formulas: 卦中多者取來情 (dominant 六親 = question type)
重主過去, 交主未來 (old yin = past, old yang = future)

special_protocols.layer_shift: all 3 layers (天干, 地支, 納音) engaged simultaneously
special_protocols.unique_mechanism: Character identification protocol. All three coordinate layers activate: 天干 → radical type (甲=木/田/日, 乙=草頭/弓, 丙=火/撇/捺, etc.). 地支 → structural element (子=水旁, 丑=橫畫, 寅=山/宗, etc.). 納音 → character type refinement. Eight trigrams → stroke patterns (乾=圓/點, 坎=雨頭/點水, 艮=橫畫/口, 震=木象/立畫, etc.). Day stem × 用爻 × inner/outer/互 trigrams combine to determine surname. Example: 甲乙日 + 純艮(Earth) + 寅(Wood) → three-body Wood → 林 surname.
key_formulas: 干配姓, 支配合, 納音配字
日配用爻, 兼內外互卦正化體象取勝為主

guashen_activations.activation: 卦身 counts as one 六親 type (whichever type sits at that line)
When 世 is 空亡 (void), read 卦身 instead as the self-reference point
guashen_activations.condition: 世 line is in 旬空

guashen_activations.activation: 卦身 line carries 官鬼 → hidden illness in the person
guashen_activations.condition: 卦身 line's 六親 = 官鬼

guashen_activations.text: 又看身爻，身是鬼主有疾；身是父主識字；身是兄多說謊；身是子主慈善；身是財最好
guashen_activations.activation: 卦身's 六親 type characterizes the servant's nature
guashen_activations.condition: Always — 卦身 type → personality mapping

guashen_activations.text: 卦有身，相見更看用爻，用爻生身尤好；卦無身又無用爻，終不見
guashen_activations.activation: If 卦身 exists (on a line): check if 用爻 generates 卦身 — very favorable. If 卦身 absent AND 用爻 absent/void: meeting will not happen.
guashen_activations.condition: 卦身 on-line vs off-line determines availability

guashen_activations.text: 皆要生合卦身，不宜刑沖
guashen_activations.activation: Ritual offerings must 生 or 合 the 卦身 — not 刑 or 沖 it
guashen_activations.condition: Ritual context: 日辰/月建 relationship to 卦身

guashen_activations.text: 身爻世爻被太歲沖、生、合，有赦也
guashen_activations.activation: 卦身 AND 世 受 太歲 沖/生/合 → pardon/release
guashen_activations.condition: 太歲 (year branch) interacts with 卦身 line

guashen_activations.activation: 卦身 carries 兄弟 → all 5 structural elements complete (上等屋)
guashen_activations.condition: 卦身 line's 六親 = 兄弟 + no 空/刑/沖/克

guashen_activations.text: 凡卦身或空，未住；身並，現住。身值鬼，屋下有伏屍
guashen_activations.activation: 卦身 空 → not yet living there. 卦身 present (身並) → currently living there. 卦身 = 鬼 → corpse under the house.

guashen_activations.text: 次論卦身...卦身在初二爻葬在低處，三四爻平處，五六爻高處
guashen_activations.activation: 卦身's line position determines burial elevation. L1-2=low, L3-4=level, L5-6=high.
guashen_activations.condition: 卦身 line position → physical height

guashen_activations.text: 後審卦身有無吉囚，然後定休咎
guashen_activations.activation: Final step: check whether 卦身 is in 吉 (favorable) or 囚 (imprisoned) state
guashen_activations.condition: 卦身 seasonal strength → final verdict modifier
